failure.symptom: Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: signin-page.tsx password input and eye toggle button are siblings in a 'relative mb-4' div, but error message display breaks layout. Fix wraps input+button in inner 'relative' div inside outer 'mb-4 flex flex-col' div, separating layout concerns.
